task:
Audacity is already running. Disable both of the following Warnings preferences while leaving every other warning unchanged:
- 'First project save' (the warning shown the first time a project is saved)
- 'Saving projects as compressed files' (the compressed-save warning)

The change must be persisted to `~/.audacity-data/audacity.cfg` under the `[Warnings]` section as `FirstProjectSave=0` and `SaveCompressed=0`.

verification.description: FirstProjectSave key is written to audacity.cfg
SaveCompressed key is written to audacity.cfg
